title: Bode Agusto, dies at 68
description: A former Director-General of the Budget Office of the Federation, Bode Agusto, has died at the age of 68. Agusto was the founder of Agusto & Co, a Pan-African credit rating agency. The news
html:
A former Director-General of the Budget Office of the Federation, Bode Agusto, has died at the age of 68.

Agusto was the founder of Agusto & Co, a Pan-African credit rating agency.

The news of Agusto’s death was announced by the Chief Executive Officer, Founder and Chairman of Proshare Nigeria, Olufemi Awoyemi on Thursday via his handle on X (formerly Twitter).

Awoyemi tweeted, “@bodeagusto, the founder of @agustoandco, was the pioneer who taught us all how to respect facts and data in our engagements.

“A great human being and a fabulous teacher you were. Your teachings, delivered with conviction, will always be with all of us; our career paths were impacted by you.
